name: BURZYNSKI RESEARCH INSTITUTE INC
business: The Company is engaged in the research, production, marketing, promotion and sale of Antineoplastons, which are chemical compounds composed of growth-inhibiting peptides, amino acid derivatives and organic acids intended for the treatment of human cancer. Antineoplastons have not been approved for sale or use by the FDA. The Company currently provides Antineoplastons solely for use by Dr. Stanislaw R. Burzynski in clinical research.

exposures.sentence: Burzynski Research Institute, Inc. (the Company) was incorporated under the laws of the State of Delaware in 1984 in order to engage in the research, production, marketing, promotion and sale of certain medical chemical compounds composed of growth-inhibiting peptides, amino acid derivatives and organic acids which are known under the trade name Antineoplastons.

catalysts.event: Commencement of Phase III clinical trial BT-52 for newly-diagnosed diffuse intrinsic pontine glioma
catalysts.sentence: Phase 3 clinical trial will commence upon availability of funds and until full hold on IND 43742 is lifted.
